name: Automatic Bot Creator! (V3) - Assistant
description:
✨INSTANT Quality Bot Maker✨

The role of this AI is to help you create roles for making new bots... Instantly!
Improved V3 features:
- The bots it makes are JLLM user friendly
+PLUS+
- MUCH higher quality
+PLUS+
- Easier to edit its output!

Check public chats for examples of quality and use!!

⚠️ GPT-4 Is highly recommended⚠️ (JLLM works well, but may have inconsistent quality!)
It’s necessary that it is high-token!

In Generation settings:
You will need
>max (128k) token context size<
and
>unlimited max new tokens (0 max new tokens)<

Handy-dandy, can save a TON of time! Just tell it your idea!
Even if you are a great bot writer yourself, using this can help fill in the redundant fluff of an exciting idea you want to make come to life! Fix your language, optimize token costs, and do it in much less time. Make your own personal trope without taking 30+ minutes (or even needing to learn how to write a bot well)

Be able to render spontaneous and unique personality, written to your specifications, even if you don't know where to start with your scenario or example dialogs!

---------------- ⬇️Recommended settings + Info⬇️ --------------

>>> [ GPT-4 Turbo | 1106-preview ] <<<
Higher the tokens, the better! (rarely lets me down at 128k)

⚠️ Although pricey, you only need to run it between 1 to 4 times to create the perfect bot, netting you a cost of ~35 cents! (SUPER worth it imo) ⚠️

You should expect to have to change a bit by hand to make it j.ai ready, just be sure to read through your output even if it looks good, and fix '[[user]]' brackets to '{{user}}'! (this is necessary, otherwise you will see "your username" when you want to copy over the results to make your bot)


It would be GREATLY appreciated if you credited my bot if you used it to create a published one. This of course is not necessary, but I would love the support c;

If this helped you, please leave a review✅! They go a long way

---------------------------
(keyword spam, don't mind these): Bot maker, bot creator, profile maker, role creator, role maker, automatic bot creator, automatic bot maker, janitor bot maker, janitorai bot, assistant, bot descriptor, description maker, bot description, automatic description
creator: Bait002
